message:
feat(demo): expand showcase screens with rich interactive examples

Major expansion of the demo showcase application with new screens and
enhanced interactivity to demonstrate FrankenTUI capabilities.

New screens:

voi_overlay.rs (new):
- Real-time VOI (Value of Information) sampling visualization
- Live chart of measurement decisions and outcomes
- Toggle between different VOI strategies
- Export measurement history for analysis

Enhanced screens:

dashboard.rs:
- Add sparkline charts with live data updates
- Implement gauge widgets with configurable ranges
- Add progress bar collection with different styles
- Include mini-tables with sortable columns
- Add system metrics simulation (CPU, memory, network)

data_viz.rs:
- Expand chart types (bar, line, scatter, heatmap)
- Add interactive zoom and pan controls
- Implement data point tooltips on hover
- Support multiple data series with legends

file_browser.rs:
- Add tree view with expand/collapse
- Implement file preview pane
- Add breadcrumb navigation
- Support keyboard shortcuts for common operations

macro_recorder.rs:
- Complete macro recording and playback UI
- Add timeline visualization of recorded events
- Support macro editing and splicing
- Include export to asciicast format

shakespeare.rs:
- Expand text rendering demonstrations
- Add styled text with inline formatting
- Show reflow behavior during resize
- Include bidirectional text examples

visual_effects.rs:
- Add animation showcase (fade, slide, pulse)
- Implement color gradient demonstrations
- Show box-drawing character sets
- Include terminal capability detection display

App scaffolding (app.rs):
- Add screen navigation with breadcrumbs
- Implement keyboard shortcut help overlay
- Support command palette for screen jumping
- Add theming toggle (light/dark/system)

These demonstrations serve as both capability showcase and integration
tests for the FrankenTUI widget and rendering systems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,6 +55,7 @@ SCREENS:
    26  Snapshot Player    Time-travel playback of recorded UI snapshots
    27  Performance HUD    Real-time render budget and frame diagnostics
    28  i18n Demo          Internationalization with locale switching
+   29  VOI Overlay        Galaxy-Brain VOI debug overlay
 
 KEYBINDINGS:
     1-9, 0          Switch to screens 1-10 by number
